titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Acquisitions Department, Yale University Library, Records
Acquisitions Department, Yale University Library, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 10:03

did.unittitle: Acquisitions Department, Yale University Library, records
did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, memoranda, card files, statistics, reports, and gift and acknowledgment files documenting gifts and materials received by the Acquisitions Department, Yale University Library.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 32-C (YRG 32-C), Records of Yale University Library departments and offices.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Acquisitions Department, Yale University Library, Records (RU 346). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, memoranda, card files, statistics, reports, and gift and acknowledgment files documenting gifts and materials received by the Acquisitions Department, Yale University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted to office of origin only

did.unittitle: Annual reports of the gift section to head of Order Dept

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted to office of origin only

did.unittitle: A-G and gift continuation claims sent
H-S and S.C. discard reply letters

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted to office of origin only

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted to office of origin only

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted to office of origin only

did.unittitle: W - Z and list of acknowledgements sent in Mr. - Babb ' s absence
American Nusical Theater Fund - J. H. Ottemiller
American Musical Theater Fund - Robert L. Barlow
Card file of Yale publications received by Yale University Library
Card file of Yale publications received by Yale University Library
Copies of questions on 74-75 donor list
Donor list and statistics, ticklers and memos
Yale College Programs of Study - Calendar
Kline Science Library, List of donors

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted to office of origin only

accessrestrict.p: Restricted to office of origin only

accessrestrict.p: Restricted to office of origin only

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted to Office of Origin only

odd.head: General
odd.p: All boxes are dated circa 1975-1985 unless otherwise noted.

odd.head: General
odd.p: Box includes miscellaneous files and files on the publication: YUL Reports of the Library

odd.head: General
odd.p: Box includes vendor contact information files

odd.head: General
odd.p: Box includes files on the University Bulletin
